/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/ollamadev-ade_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/Canvas.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/Pane.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/TerminalWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/VtParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/BoardPane.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/EditorPane.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/FilesPane.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ollamadev-ade.dir/Theme.cpp.o" -o ollamadev-ade  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: ../core/libodv-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.4.2 -lutil /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
